message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
{"type":"shutdown_request","requestId":"shutdown-1770838443383@kent-beck","from":"team-lead","reason":"Task #18 (Retrospective) is complete. All 13 changes committed. Shutting down the team per project owner request. Thank you for your contributions.","timestamp":"2026-02-11T19:34:03.383Z"}

input.content: Acknowledged. Good session. The team is in a strong position: solid test strategy, clear domain model, disciplined pipeline (now strengthened). Looking forward to test-driving the Clarify workflow next -- that's where the real GTD domain logic lives.

toolUseResult.message: Shutdown approved. Sent confirmation to team-lead. Agent kent-beck is now exiting.
